raw_consumer_statement: This is regarding American Express dispute XXXX against company XXXX. They initially were requesting the merchant for credit but now the chargeback appears open and theres no mention of them requesting refund credit. I provided proof that what I received was missing the main item I bought and even weighed the box and what I received to show yet Americans XXXX is XXXX to XXXX customers and does not view our evidence correctly or accurately.
